hypothesis: Real-money pilot sleeve exploration becomes scientifically usable only if closed pilot trades are appended against their frozen pre-trade counterfactuals and daily output reports direct PnL, replacement value, and pending counterfactual coverage.
why_not_direct_alpha_parameter_change: The pilot sleeve is already trade-enabled. The next blocker is proving whether a pilot trade beat the slot it consumed; changing signal thresholds before this attribution exists would make the new universe experiment less trustworthy.

parameters.single_causal_variable: closed pilot outcome attribution and replacement-value rollup
parameters.closed_trade_hook: performance_engine.close_trade appends decision_outcome when trade metadata carries pilot_sleeve.decision_id

production_impact.note: This change reports and records pilot outcomes only. It does not alter entry, exit, ranking, or sizing decisions.

decision_reason: Accepted because it removes the largest remaining blocker to evaluating the live AI infrastructure pilot sleeve: raw pilot PnL can now be compared against frozen counterfactuals without changing strategy behavior.
known_risks: Replacement value remains pending until counterfactual outcomes are known.
If pilot trades are executed outside performance_engine without preserving decision_id metadata, outcomes must be appended manually.
No pilot trade has closed yet, so this is attribution plumbing rather than positive alpha evidence.
next_steps: Let daily runs accumulate decision snapshots and closed outcomes.
Add Phase 6 weekly promotion review after enough forward pilot decisions exist.
Do not promote pilot names to limited_production before replacement-value evidence is positive and non-concentrated.
